subcodes.first_line: The hoopoe was one who Solomon dispatched as a messenger, and attained unto the loftiest heights of renown though it was but a feeble bird [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هد هد شخصی بود که سلیمان بقاصدی فرستاد و باعلی درجه شهرت رسید  مرغی ضعیف بود
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
